title: Software Developer
description_raw:
Kami saat ini sedang mencari Software Developer yang kompeten dan berpengalaman untuk mendukung pengembangan solusi digital di sektor perbankan. Peran ini mencakup pengembangan aplikasi, integrasi sistem, peningkatan performa dan reliability, penerapan best practice engineering, serta memastikan standar keamanan dan kualitas aplikasi sesuai kebutuhan industri perbankan.

📍Jakarta, Indonesia

🕗Full WFO, Sen-Jum ; 08.00-17.00 WIB

📝Project-based kontrak

Deskripsi Pekerjaan:

Mengembangkan, menguji, dan memelihara aplikasi digital (web, mobile, dan backend services) khususnya di lingkungan digital banking.

Membangun dan mengimplementasikan arsitektur modern seperti Microservices, Event-Driven Architecture, serta Microfrontend.

Berkolaborasi dengan tim lintas fungsi menggunakan metodologi Agile/Scrum.

Mengembangkan aplikasi yang scalable, secure, dan high-performance.

Melakukan unit testing, integration testing, serta automation testing untuk memastikan kualitas aplikasi.

Mengelola integrasi API, messaging system, dan data processing.

Mendukung proses deployment dan CI/CD pipeline.


Kualifikasi:

Minimal pendidikan S1 di bidang Teknik Informatika, Sistem Informasi, Teknik Komputer, atau bidang terkait.

Pengalaman minimal 3 tahun sebagai Software Developer (Backend / Frontend / Mobile).

Memahami fundamental ilmu komputer, struktur data, dan basis data.

Menguasai salah satu atau lebih tech stack berikut:

Backend: Java (Spring Boot), Python, Node.js, .NET

Mobile: Swift (iOS), Kotlin (Android)

Frontend Web: JavaScript / TypeScript (Angular / Next.js)

Memahami arsitektur aplikasi seperti Clean Architecture, MVVM/VIPER, Modular Architecture.

Berpengalaman dengan:

Messaging: Kafka, RabbitMQ, Redis Pub/Sub

Database: SQL (Oracle/PostgreSQL), MongoDB, Redis

API & Data Transfer: REST API, SFTP, Object Storage (AWS S3)

Terbiasa dengan tools DevOps & CI/CD seperti Docker, Kubernetes, GitLab CI, Jenkins, Fastlane.

Memahami konsep authentication (SSO), security, serta best practice secure coding.

Memiliki pengalaman dalam testing (Unit, Integration, Automation).

Nilai tambah: memahami tracing, profiling, monitoring, serta implementasi microfrontend.

Dapat bergabung secepatnya

title: Full Stack AI Developer
description_raw:
About the Role

We are looking for a Full Stack AI Engineer who can bridge the gap between advanced Artificial Intelligence and production-grade application development. In this role, you will not only build backend AI logic and integrate Large Language Models (LLMs); you will also design and develop the user interfaces and full-system architectures that make these tools accessible to our Operations, Product, and Engineering teams. You will own the entire lifecycle of internal AI products, from the database vector store to the React frontend.




Key Responsibilities:

End-to-End AI Application Development

Design, build, and maintain full-stack AI-enabled tools and dashboards, ensuring seamless integration between the frontend (UI) and backend AI services.

Develop intuitive user interfaces (using React) that allow non-technical stakeholders to interact with complex AI agents, chatbots, and automation workflows.

AI Integration & Backend Engineering

Integrate language models (LLMs) and AI components into existing platforms using Python and modern frameworks (e.g., LangChain, LangGraph).

Architect and develop robust RESTful APIs that serve AI model outputs to client applications with low latency.

Implement RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipelines, managing both traditional databases (SQL) and vector databases for efficient context retrieval.

Collaboration & Strategy

Work closely with cross-functional stakeholders (Operations, Product) to translate business pain points into full-stack AI solutions.

Infrastructure & Quality

Assist in data preparation, model testing, and the deployment of containerized applications (Docker/Kubernetes) to cloud environments.

Participate in design reviews and code reviews for both frontend and backend stacks to ensure high engineering standards.

Monitor the performance of deployed models and applications, setting up observability for both system health (latency/errors) and model quality (hallucinations/accuracy).




Requirements:

Education & Experience

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.

2+ years of software development experience with a focus on full-stack web development.

Technical Skills (Full Stack)

Frontend: Proficiency in modern JavaScript/TypeScript frameworks (React) and CSS processors (Tailwind, SASS) for building responsive interfaces.

Backend: Expert-level proficiency in Python (for AI workloads) and experience with web frameworks (FastAPI, Django, or Flask). Experience with Node.js.

Databases: Strong grasp of SQL (PostgreSQL, MySQL) and experience with Vector Databases (Pinecone, Milvus, or pgvector).

AI & ML Capabilities

Familiarity with modern AI tools and frameworks (e.g., LangChain, LangGraph, Transformers, OpenAI APIs).

Solid understanding of key AI concepts: Prompt Engineering, Embeddings, RAG pipelines, and Multi-Agent systems.

Strong Computer Science fundamentals: algorithms, data structures, and systems design.

DevOps & Deployment

Exposure to deploying AI systems and web apps in production (e.g., CI/CD pipelines, Docker containers, AWS/GCP/Azure).

Experience managing state and asynchronous tasks (e.g., Redis, Celery, RabbitMQ) for handling long-running AI inference jobs.

Soft Skills

Strong analytical and problem-solving mindset with a willingness to experiment and iterate.

Passion for building practical, reliable AI systems that solve real internal problems at scale.

Why Join Us?

Opportunity to work in a dynamic and growing company with a commitment to innovation.

Collaborative work environment with a focus on continuous learning and development.

title: Middle AI Engineer
description_raw:
Here's the updated version with years of experience added:

Role Description

We are seeking a motivated and detail-oriented Middle AI Engineer to join our engineering team at PT Fata Organa Solusi. In this role, you will focus on designing, building, and deploying AI-powered solutions, integrating large language models (LLMs) into production systems, and developing machine learning pipelines that deliver real business value. You will collaborate closely with product, data, and software engineering teams to translate business problems into AI solutions, fine-tune and evaluate models, and ensure the reliability and scalability of AI services in production. This is an excellent opportunity for a highly responsible individual with a passion for artificial intelligence, applied machine learning, and emerging LLM technologies who is eager to grow within a supportive, innovation-focused environment. Your technical skills and commitment to good teamwork will be essential in delivering robust and impactful AI solutions.

Responsibilities:

You will design, implement, and maintain AI/ML pipelines covering data preparation, model training, evaluation, and deployment using frameworks such as PyTorch, TensorFlow, scikit-learn, or similar.

You will build and integrate LLM-based applications using APIs and frameworks such as OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Azure OpenAI, LangChain, LlamaIndex, or similar, including prompt engineering, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), and agentic workflows.

You will develop and maintain vector databases and embedding pipelines (e.g., Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, pgvector, FAISS) to support semantic search and retrieval use cases.

You will deploy AI models and services to production using containerization (Docker) and cloud platforms such as Azure, AWS, or Google Cloud Platform, ensuring scalability, latency, and cost efficiency.

You will implement evaluation frameworks, guardrails, and monitoring for AI systems to track model performance, hallucinations, drift, and safety in production.

You will collaborate with product and engineering teams to translate business requirements into AI solutions, define success metrics, and iterate based on feedback and data.

You will fine-tune, adapt, and optimize models (including small language models, embeddings, and classical ML models) when off-the-shelf solutions are insufficient.

You will manage version control workflows for code, prompts, datasets, and models, including reproducibility and experiment tracking using tools like Git, MLflow, or Weights & Biases.

You will troubleshoot AI/ML system issues, applying strong problem-solving skills to diagnose problems across data, model, and infrastructure layers.

You will document model designs, prompt strategies, evaluation results, and operational runbooks to maintain knowledge across the team.

You will proactively engage in self-learning to keep up with the rapidly evolving AI landscape, and if necessary, be willing to unlearn and relearn methods to maintain industry best practices.

Requirements:

Minimum 3 years of professional experience in AI/ML engineering, data science, or a closely related software engineering role, with at least 1 year working on AI/LLM-based applications in production.

Solid understanding of machine learning fundamentals (supervised/unsupervised learning, evaluation metrics, overfitting, regularization, etc.).

Hands-on experience building applications with LLMs through APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure OpenAI, or similar) and/or open-source models (Llama, Mistral, Qwen, or similar).

Strong proficiency in Python, including common libraries such as NumPy, pandas, and at least one ML framework (PyTorch, TensorFlow, or scikit-learn).

Experience with at least one cloud platform: Azure, AWS, or Google Cloud Platform, including their AI/ML services.

Experience with containerization technologies, particularly Docker.

Practical experience with prompt engineering, RAG architectures, embeddings, and vector search.

Experience building and consuming RESTful APIs, with familiarity in frameworks such as FastAPI or Flask.

Experience with any RDBMS systems: SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MySQL, or similar, with solid SQL proficiency.

Strong understanding of Git concepts (branching, PR, commit, merge, tagging).

Strong sense of responsibility, good teamwork, and communication skills.

Strong problem-analyzing and problem-solving skills, with good debugging ability across data, code, and model layers.

Willingness to self-learn new things, and if necessary, unlearn and relearn methods, especially given the fast pace of AI advancement.

Fluent in English, proven by an interview in English (equivalent to at least 525 TOEFL PBT or 5.5 IELTS or 55 TOEFL iBT).

Advantageous if:

Have experience deploying AI/ML models to production at scale (model serving, batching, GPU optimization).

Experience with agentic frameworks and tool use (LangChain, LlamaIndex, LangGraph, AutoGen, or similar).

Exper

title: Software Engineer (Intern)
description_raw:
Deskripsi pekerjaan Software Engineer (Intern) Glints Taploker

At Glints, we are building the #1 tech-enabled recruitment and career discovery platform in Southeast Asia that helps people and organizations realize their human potential.

Join Glints as a Software Engineer Intern and be part of our mission to help people and organizations realize their human potential. You’ll work with experienced engineers on real-world products that power job matching, hiring, and talent development in Southeast Asia.

Whether your focus is frontend, backend, or full-stack, you’ll build scalable solutions, learn agile development, and gain mentorship from Glints’ high-performance engineering team.

A Pathway to Your Full-Time Career

Please note: This program is designed as a direct launchpad for a full-time career at Glints. Our primary goal is to mentor and develop promising talent into long-term team members.

Full-Time Conversion: While not guaranteed, this internship has a strong potential for a full-time (FT) offer. Conversion is based on your performance during the program and business needs at the time of completion.
Eligibility: Because of this, the ideal candidate is a final-year university student or a recent graduate who is able to transition into a full-time role.
Commitment & Location: This is a full-time role. While the on-site requirement for the internship is negotiable, we expect you to work from our office upon conversion to a full-time position.

What You'll Be Doing

In this role, you will:

- Collaborate with an agile development team to support the delivery of impactful web features and improvements.

- Assist in building and testing web application features, primarily using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, and React or similar frameworks.

- Support frontend development tasks such as fixing bugs, improving UI, or implementing small features under close guidance.

- Participate in code reviews, and team discussions where you will learn industry best practices and coding standards.

- Be mentored by team members and gradually take on more responsibility as you grow in technical confidence and capability.

Why You Should Join Us

- Collaboration: You’ll be part of a supportive and diverse team, learning from experienced engineers while contributing to real projects in a collaborative environment.

- Real-World Experience: You will be working on one of our biggest products by user base, which is currently one of the leading job marketplaces in Indonesia.

- Multicultural Environment: Join a multicultural team with members from different countries. We value your unique background and fresh perspective.

- Learning & Innovation: We encourage curiosity and creativity. You’ll be supported to explore new ideas and grow your technical and problem-solving skills.

- Meaningful Contribution: Your work will help improve a platform that positively impacts the careers of millions of young professionals across Southeast Asia.

Who We Are Looking For

We’re looking for enthusiastic learners who are passionate about web development and eager to grow through hands-on experience. While we don’t expect interns to be experts, we value a strong foundation, curiosity, and a willingness to learn.

- Web Fundamentals: Basic knowledge of HTML, CSS, and TypeScript.

- Frontend Development: Some experience in React and frameworks like Next.js, and a desire to learn how modern web applications are built.

- APIs: Basic understanding of how web apps communicate with backend services using REST or GraphQL.

- Version Control: Familiarity with Git for tracking code changes and collaborating with a team.

- Responsive Design: Awareness of responsive design principles and the ability to create layouts that work across devices.

- Performance Awareness: Interest in learning how to make websites fast and efficient.

- Security Awareness: Open to learning best practices for keeping web applications secure.

Soft Skills

- Problem-Solving: A logical mindset and curiosity to debug and figure things out.

- Communication: Ability to ask good questions, explain what you're working on, and share progress or blockers clearly.

- Team Collaboration: Willingness to work closely with peers and mentors, and to contribute to a supportive team environment.

- Adaptability: Comfortable learning new tools, frameworks, and adapting to feedback.

title: IT Security Engineer
description_raw:
Join us in building vertical AI solutions for businesses.

We’re an AI-driven company on a mission to embed intelligent automation and analytics into the heart of enterprise systems. If you're a hands-on data scientist or AI engineer with 1–2 years of experience and a passion for cloud, machine learning, and large language models (LLMs), we want to meet you.




What You'll Do

Secure and harden virtualized environments (VMware, KVM, Hyper-V, Proxmox) and cloud VMs across AWS / Azure / GCP

Design and enforce hardening baselines (CIS Benchmarks, STIG) for Linux workloads at scale

Drive vulnerability management, patching strategy, and configuration drift detection across hybrid infrastructure

Lead cloud security architecture reviews, threat modeling, and IAM / network segmentation design

Build and tune detection on SIEM / EDR (auditd, Falco, OSQuery, Wazuh) for Linux-based threats

Investigate incidents at the OS level — process trees, syscalls, container escapes, kernel exploits

Embed security into CI/CD and IaC pipelines (Terraform, Ansible, Kubernetes)

Ensure compliance with ISO 27001, SOC 2, NIST, OJK, and UU PDP



What You Bring

Minimum 3 years in IT security, with deep hands-on focus on cloud and VM security

High proficiency in Linux — comfortable with system internals, SELinux / AppArmor, namespaces, cgroups, kernel hardening, and shell scripting

Strong experience securing virtualized and cloud workloads (hypervisor hardening, VM isolation, golden image pipelines)

Solid grasp of CSPM, CWPP, CNAPP, Zero Trust, and container / Kubernetes security

Working knowledge of at least one major cloud (AWS / Azure / GCP) and IaC tooling

Scripting in Python, Bash, or Go

Certifications a strong plus: OSCP, GCIH, GCUX, RHCE, CCSP, AWS Security Specialty, AZ-500, or CISSP




Bonus Points

Experience with eBPF-based security tooling (Falco, Cilium, Tetragon)

Background in red teaming, threat hunting, or DFIR on Linux

Familiarity with securing AI / ML or agentic AI workloads

Experience in fintech or regulated industries

title: Front-End Developer – 8th hire at a Startup!
description_raw:
I'm an entrepreneur from Germany running a team in Indonesia, and I'm looking for a Front-End Developer to be my 8th team member! This is an exciting opportunity to get in at the ground level of a growing business.

Initially, this role will be freelance (full-time or part-time) while I set up the company, with the goal of transitioning to a full-time position after 4 months. The role is Jakarta-based, with the possibility of becoming 100% remote after the first year. If you're looking for long-term growth, ownership, and the chance to shape how we work from day one, this is for you!

Responsibilities

Develop and customize Shopify themes using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Liquid

Collaborate with our team to create, optimize, and scale e-commerce stores

Improve store speed, performance, and mobile responsiveness

Integrate third-party apps and services via REST APIs and GraphQL

Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues efficiently

What We're Looking For

Minimum 1+ years of frontend development experience is required

Fluent in English (spoken and written) – communication is key!

Proficiency in HTML, CSS, JavaScript (Vanilla or frameworks like React/Vue)

Some experience (or strong willingness to learn) WordPress & Liquid

Familiarity with APIs, version control (GitHub), and Agile workflows

Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail

Entrepreneurial mindset – someone who takes initiative and works independently

Good communication skills—able to discuss ideas and propose solutions

Why Join?

🚀 Be the 8th hire – play a key role in shaping the company
📍 Jakarta-based (or willing to move to Jakarta for your first year) – with the possibility of becoming 100% remote after the first year
📈 Career growth – start as a freelancer and transition into a full-time role
💰 Competitive pay + Bonuses for performance and loyalty
🕒 Flexible working hours – work when you're most productive
🏢 WeWork membership – access to a professional co-working space in Jakarta

How to Apply

Let me know that you're the right fit by answering this in your cover letter:

👉 A Shopify store loads slowly on mobile. What steps would you take to identify and fix the issue? (Keep it practical—no need for a perfect answer. We're interested in how you think.)

Feel free to explain your approach or provide a code snippet!
skills: agile, api, css, git, graphql, html, java, javascript, react, vue

title: Internal Product Engineer / Full Stack Developer
description_raw:
We are looking for a highly capable Full Stack Developer to join our growing team full-time in a remote role based in Indonesia.

This role is ideal for someone who enjoys building internal systems, solving operational problems, and creating scalable tools from the ground up. You will be working closely with management to develop and maintain internal platforms, CRM systems, workflow automations, and future software projects across the business.

One of the key projects includes building an advanced internal lead management and CRM platform tailored for our advisory business — a modern, scalable system but customized for internal operations and workflows.

This is a long-term role. Beyond the initial project, you will continue improving existing systems while contributing to new internal software initiatives.




What You’ll Be Working On

Design and build internal CRM and lead management systems

Develop scalable web applications and internal tools

Build clean, responsive front-end interfaces and robust backend systems

Improve operational workflows through automation and system integrations

Maintain and enhance existing software products

Work closely with management to translate business ideas into working products

Ensure system performance, scalability, and security best practices

Participate in product planning, feature discussions, testing, and deployment

Create clean technical documentation and maintain code quality standards

Skills & Experience Needed

Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience in full stack development

Strong experience in modern web development frameworks and architecture

Proficiency in JavaScript / TypeScript, HTML, CSS

Strong experience with React, Next.js, Node.js, or equivalent frameworks

Experience working with databases and backend infrastructure

Experience designing scalable internal tools or SaaS-style applications

Understanding of API integrations, authentication systems, and cloud deployment

Familiarity with AI-assisted development tools and workflows is a plus

Strong problem-solving ability and attention to detail

Ability to work independently and take ownership of projects

Good verbal and written English communication skills

Bonus Points If You Have

Experience building CRM systems, workflow systems, or sales platforms

Experience with automation tools and AI integrations

UI/UX design sense for internal productivity tools

Startup or fast-paced product development experience

What We’re Looking For

We are not just looking for someone to complete tasks. We are looking for a builder — someone who can think through systems, suggest improvements, and help create products that improve how our business operates.

If you enjoy ownership, problem-solving, and building impactful products from scratch, we’d love to speak with you.

title: FULL STACK SOFTWARE DEVELOPER
description_raw:
We are looking for a Full Stack Software Developer who can build, deploy, and continuously improve AI SaaS, mobile, and web applications. This role is for a builder, not only a coder: someone who can understand business problems, prototype fast, connect APIs, ship usable products, automate workflows, and improve based on user feedback. Portfolio is required: applicants should provide GitHub, deployed app links, product demos, or screenshots/walkthroughs of shipped work.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Build full-stack web applications, internal tools, AI-enabled SaaS features, dashboards, mobile-friendly experiences, and lightweight mobile/web products.

Design and implement front-end, back-end, database, API, authentication, deployment, and monitoring components.

Integrate AI APIs, LLM workflows, automation tools, document processing, CRM/ATS data, and third-party services.

Turn business requirements into product logic, wireframes, MVPs, user flows, release-ready features, and practical product documentation.

Own deployment, debugging, version control, security basics, performance improvement, monitoring, and documentation.

Work with leadership and operations teams to automate manual workflows and reduce operational headcount pressure.

Use AI coding tools responsibly to speed up development while maintaining code quality and security.




IDEAL PROFILE

3+ years in full-stack software development, or a strong portfolio showing shipped web/mobile/SaaS products.

Hands-on experience with modern web stack such as React/Next.js, Node.js, Python, APIs, SQL/NoSQL, cloud hosting, and Git.

Experience building SaaS, internal tools, dashboards, mobile/web apps, AI features, or automation workflows.

Practical exposure to AI APIs, LLM app development, agents, RAG, prompt engineering, or workflow automation preferred.

Able to move from idea to prototype to production with limited supervision and clear ownership.

Strong problem-solving, documentation, clean handover, and communication with non-technical stakeholders.




AI-first expectation

Expected to use AI coding assistants, LLM APIs, automation tools, and rapid prototyping platforms to increase output speed while preserving security, maintainability, documentation quality, and user value. Portfolio is required: candidates should provide GitHub, live demo, deployed app, App Store/Play Store link, product walkthrough, or equivalent proof of shipped capability.




If you are excited to build smarter, faster, and more scalable ways of working in a lean professional services business, please apply through this platform.

title: Front-End React Developer
description_raw:
Want To Build Interfaces People Actually Use?

John Galt Services seeks a full-time Front-End React Developer to serve a US customer building a construction project management platform used by contractors across the United States.

This is a production SaaS product with real users managing real projects: tracking leads, building proposals, scheduling jobs, managing equipment and inventory, processing invoices and purchase orders. The front end is a React + TypeScript monorepo with two apps: a full-featured CMS for internal teams and a customer-facing portal. It's built on modern tooling—Vite, Tailwind, Radix UI, TanStack Query—with a shared component library and domain-specific packages.

You won't be tweaking landing pages or building throwaway prototypes. You'll be building complex, data-rich interfaces that contractors depend on every day. The problems are real, the users are real, and the architecture is designed to scale.

You must be fluent in English. You will join our customer's development team as a remote member with real responsibilities, not pixel-pushing tickets.

IMPORTANT!

Your application is our first test of your attention to detail and ability to follow instructions. 👀

👉 Read this ENTIRE job listing!

👉 Follow the application instructions EXACTLY!

👉 If you do not meet the minimum qualifications for the job, DO NOT APPLY!

If you fail to follow the instructions below, we will reject your application without reading it!

Minimum Job Qualifications

FLUENT SPOKEN & WRITTEN ENGLISH! You will communicate daily with a US-based team. Your English must be clear and confident: spoken and written. If you aren't sure, keep practicing and apply next time.

SOLID REACT & TYPESCRIPT SKILLS! You should be comfortable building real applications with React and TypeScript: not just following tutorials. You need to understand component composition, hooks, state management, and how to structure a codebase that won't collapse under its own mass. If your idea of state management is useState for everything, take some time to level up first.

EXPERIENCE WITH MODERN UI TOOLING! The front end is a pnpm monorepo (Turborepo) with two apps—a CMS and a customer portal—built on React + Vite, Tailwind CSS, Radix UI, React Hook Form, Zod, and TanStack React Query. You don't need to know all of these, but you should have built something real with at least a few of them. If you've never worked with a component library or a design system, this will be a steep climb.

AN EYE FOR DETAIL AND QUALITY! You will build interfaces for real users who care about things working correctly. Forms that validate properly. Tables that sort and paginate. Drag-and-drop that doesn't break. Rich text editing that produces clean output. If you think "it works on my machine" is a valid QA strategy, we're not a match.

WILLINGNESS TO LEARN AND TAKE OWNERSHIP! The codebase includes shared libraries for authentication, domain models, and UI components. You'll be expected to understand the architecture, not just drop code into it. If you need someone to hand you a Figma file for every pixel, this role will be frustrating for both of us.

You MUST have at least a Bachelor degree.

You MUST be willing to work late night hours.

You MUST either live on Bali or be willing to relocate to Bali.

You MUST have the right to work legally in Indonesia. JGS does NOT sponsor work visas!

ATTENTION TO DETAIL! The moment we see your application, we'll know.

If you do not meet ALL of these requirements, DO NOT APPLY for this job!

Nice To Have

Tailwind CSS

Radix UI / shadcn/ui

TanStack React Query

React Hook Form + Zod

Monorepo tooling (pnpm workspaces, Turborepo)

TipTap or similar rich text editors

Git & GitHub Actions

Working Arrangements

You are supporting our customer remotely, but this is NOT a remote job! We will provide working space and equipment near Canggu, Bali. All work is performed on-site.

Salary & Benefits

New associates start at a probationary pay scale of IDR 8 jt / month gross (i.e. before taxes & benefits). Your probationary period is three months.

If we retain you past three months, your pay will increase to IDR 12 jt / month gross.

We pay performance bonuses based on your ability to contribute. The less hand-holding you need and the less rework your code requires, the more valuable you are to the team. After your probationary period, we will pay up to a 50% bonus for any month in which you meet or exceed our expectations. This would bring your pay as high as IDR 18 jt / month gross.

We also reserve a large pool of funds for staff perks, events & annual bonuses. If we are happy with your work, you will be VERY happy with your choice!

Also, our office is just minutes from the beach, right outside Canggu, Bali. If you know, you know!

Who Is John Galt?

Good question! Might help to show up at your interview with an answer.

HOW TO APPLY 👈

Make sure your JobStreet profile includes a valid email & WhatsApp phone number.

Include
skills: ci/cd, cicd, css, figma, git, react, rust, typescript

title: Software Quality Assurance
description_raw:
Job Description


About The Role

We are looking for a detail-oriented and proactive Software Quality Assurance (SQA) to join our growing engineering team. You’ll collaborate closely with developers, product managers, and designers to ensure our products meet the highest standards of quality, performance, and usability. This is a great opportunity for fresh graduates or junior-level engineers passionate about quality and innovation.

Job Descriptions

Collaborate with the development team to understand business and technical requirements.
Design comprehensive test plans and test cases that cover all aspects of the application, including web, API, and backend services.
Execute manual test cases and perform regression testing to ensure product stability.
Identify, document, and track defects using issue tracking systems (e.g., Jira).
Prepare detailed and clear test reports and participate in release sign-offs.
Contribute to and help improve QA processes and best practices across the team.

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent work experience).

Understanding of UI/UX fundamentals and how they affect testing.

Strong collaboration and communication skills.
A growth mindset and passion for delivering customer value through high-quality products.
Experience in handling sensitive and confidential information in accordance with applicable information security policies and procedures.

Preferred Qualifications

Experience or knowledge of any automation testing frameworks (e.g., Selenium, Appium, Robot, etc.).
Familiarity with performance testing and benchmarking tools.
Ability to read and understand code (JavaScript, Go, Python, or similar) is a plus.
Experience with API testing tools like Postman or similar is a plus.

Disclaimer: Your personal data will be stored and protected in accordance with the applicable laws and regulations, including Law No. 27 of 2022 on Personal Data Protection (PDP Law), as well as Meditap’s internal policies on information security and data protection.

title: AI Engineer
description_raw:
Role: AI Engineer

Location: Jakarta
Position Type: Full-time
Reports to: CTO




About the Role

We are seeking an ML Engineer to own the AI and machine learning capability within an established cross-functional team. You will be the subject matter expert on LLMs, document AI, and RAG pipelines — working alongside experienced software developers, data engineers, and database engineers.

The role has a clear long-term roadmap: helping shape the logic of our document crawler, building ML pipelines that extract and populate structured databases, and ultimately delivering an internal chatbot grounded in our own ground-truth data. You will be joining a collaborative team where software developers, data engineers, and database architects will help support the surrounding infrastructure. The ideal candidate would combine strong software engineering fundamentals with hands-on experience in web crawling, document AI, RAG pipelines, and LLM tool integration — and is comfortable taking a system from prototype to production.

Key Responsibilities

Collaborate with the software development and data engineering teams on the company document crawler — contributing to crawler logic, defining document targeting requirements, and advising on ML-driven enhancements to improve discovery, classification, and retrieval of company documents (annual reports, regulatory filings, press releases).

Develop and fine-tune workflows combining SLMs (small language models), LLMs, and rule-based methods for accurate and explainable data extraction.

Architect and build the chatbot interface that grounds LLM responses in our structured databases and PDF corpus, using RAG and MCP-based tool calling to ensure answers are traceable to source data.

Integrate relevant open-source tools across the full stack: crawling (Scrapy, Playwright), document parsing (pdfplumber, Camelot, Tabula, Docling), ML/NLP (Hugging Face, LangChain, LlamaIndex), vector stores (Qdrant, pgvector), and LLM serving (Ollama, vLLM) — selecting self-hosted vs. API-based options based on data sensitivity requirements.

Implement evaluation frameworks (accuracy, latency, cost) and maintain benchmarks for extraction quality.

Ensure robust engineering practices: testing, version control, CI/CD pipelines, containerization, and cloud deployment.

Contribute to research and stay up to date with advances in document AI, new libraries and new techniques.

Qualifications

Education: BSc (or higher) in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field.

Experience: 3+ years of professional experience as a Machine Learning Engineer, AI Engineer, or NLP Engineer.

Technical Skills (Required):

Demonstrated experience building tools that leverage LLMs/SLMs for text and document understanding.

Experience building web crawlers or scrapers (e.g. Scrapy, Playwright, BeautifulSoup) including handling rate limiting, dynamic content, and document deduplication

Strong programming skills in Python

Experience with document parsing libraries (pdfplumber, Camelot, Tabula, or Docling) and an understanding of the challenges of table extraction, multi-column layouts, and scanned documents

Hands-on use of vector databases (e.g., Chroma, Pinecone, Weaviate) for retrieval-augmented generation.

Strong background in software engineering best practices (Git, CI/CD, testing)

Nice to Have:

Knowledge of financial or commodity reporting standards and typical document structures (annual reports, earnings releases, regulatory filings).

Experience deploying AI workloads in Microsoft Azure

Familiarity with MCP (Model Context Protocol) and building tool-calling integrations that connect LLMs to structured databases or document stores

Experience self-hosting LLMs locally using tools such as Ollama or vLLM, with an understanding of the trade-offs between local inference and cloud API usage

Familiarity with API design for ML deployment

Soft Skills

Ability to work collaboratively with business stakeholders.

Excellent communication skills to explain AI model behaviour and limitations to non-technical teams.

What We Offer

Opportunity to build a greenfield AI product in the mineral economics domain.

Work with cutting-edge LLM and AI tools.

Modern, central office near to public transport and key amenities

Competitive salary
skills: azure, cicd, docker, git, python, testing

title: IT Security Specialist
description_raw:
Key Resposibilities:

Vulnerability Management: Conduct regular Vulnerability Assessments and Penetration Testing (VAPT) across web applications and infrastructure; manage the remediation process.

Security Architecture: Design and implement security controls for cloud environments (AWS/GCP) and on-premise networks.

Incident Response: Serve as the first responder to security breaches; perform root cause analysis and implement preventive measures.

Compliance & Governance: Ensure company alignment with Indonesian regulations (such as UU PDP / Personal Data Protection Law) and international standards like ISO 27001.

Identity & Access Management (IAM): Manage and audit user access rights to ensure the principle of least privilege is maintained.

Security Awareness: Develop and conduct security training programs for employees to foster a "security-first" culture.

Global Collaboration: Coordinate with the Headquarters' security team in Japan to align local security strategies with global standards.



Requirements:

Minimum of 3–5 years of professional experience in IT Security, Cybersecurity, or System Audit.

Strong knowledge of Network Security (Firewalls, VPN, IDS/IPS) and Cloud Security (GCP).

Hands-on experience with security tools (e.g., Burp Suite, Metasploit, Nessus, Wireshark, Crowdstrike, Zscaler, ManageEngine, Zabbix).

Deep understanding of the OWASP Top 10 and web application security.

Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.

Strong analytical thinking, attention to detail, and the ability to work under pressure during incident handling.

Business level English skills is required for reporting and collaboration with the Japanese HQ.



Preferred Qualifications:

Certifications: Holder of CEH (Certified Ethical Hacker), CompTIA Security+, CISSP, or CISM is a significant plus.

Industry Experience: Prior experience in E-commerce, Fintech, or large-scale digital platforms.

Automation: Ability to write scripts (Python, Bash, or PowerShell) for automating security tasks.
skills: aws, bash, gcp, python, security

title: Security Engineer
description_raw:
Minimum education: Vocational High School (SMK); Bachelor’s degree is preferred (Information Systems, Informatics Engineering, or Computer Engineering), fresh graduates are welcome.

Proficient in English, both written and spoken.

Strong communication skills and ability to work effectively in a team.

Highly motivated with a strong willingness to learn and grow.

title: UI UX Designer Intern
description_raw:
Job description for UI UX Designer Intern at Noak

Funded start-up seeking talented UI UX design interns and UX research interns to help digitize healthcare. You must have a good understanding or working knowledge of the design thinking process and design systems. Familiarity with mobile app/web development and prior experience in UX research would be very helpful. You should have a Diploma or BA in Illustration, Art, Design or the equivalent, have completed a UI UX design bootcamp or the equivalent, or have comparable experience in UI UX design.

What you will achieve from this internship is a deep understanding of the design thinking process, design systems, mobile design guidelines, and software development process. You will learn how to create highly adaptable and scalable designs, the science behind intuitive designs, and about programming-specific knowledge that are essential to great and functional designs. High performing interns will have the opportunity to convert to full-time UI UX designers.

This is a place where the best idea wins. A place where you can expect honest and open communications and co-workers who are talented, motivated, and intense. You will be solving real problems and your works will redefine communication and the sharing of information among patients, doctors, and clinics. This is the place for you if you are looking to make an impact, tackle complex problems, grow your skills, and develop a deep understanding in product development.

This will be a remote role. Applicants who have applied previously will not be shortlisted.

title: Data Analyst Intern
description_raw:
Deskripsi pekerjaan Data Analyst Intern Cad-it Iot Centre

We are seeking a Data Analyst Intern to support data-driven initiatives in Industry 4.0. This role focuses on working with high-volume operational data from industrial systems to perform data cleaning, transformation, and analysis. The intern will help process raw data into structured datasets and analyse data, enabling insights for performance monitoring, efficiency improvement, and predictive maintenance. Ideal candidates have a solid foundation in mathematics, are comfortable with tools such as SQL and Python, and are interested in applying data analysis within real-world industrial and manufacturing contexts.

Job Description

Work with high-volume industrial datasets to support analysis in Industry 4.0 use cases.
Clean, preprocess, and transform raw operational data into structured, analysis-ready formats.
Apply mathematical principles and statistical techniques to identify trends, anomalies, and performance patterns in industrial processes.
Assist in developing data models and analysis for use cases such as process performance improvement.
Support the design and improvement of data pipelines and workflows for handling large-scale industrial data.
Collaborate with engineers and operations stakeholders to enable data-driven decision-making.
Document data processes, methodologies, and analysis findings in a clear and reproducible manner.

Requirements

Minimum bachelor's (S1) or currently pursuing/recently graduated in Mathematics or related fields.
Strong interest in data science, statistics, and data analytics.
Basic understanding of data processing and transformation.
Familiarity with Python, SQL, Data Visualization, Machine Learning, or similar skills is preferable.
Able to work in a fast-paced environment, learn quickly, and prioritize assignments.
Detail-oriented and comfortable working with large datasets.
Good written and verbal communication skills.
Must be reliable, proactive, and committed to delivering quality work.
Willing to stay in Bandung.

Benefits

Monthly stipend and meal allowance.
Get exposure and hands-on experience in data analytics and real-world data projects.
Opportunity to join the team (based on performance).
skills: cicd, python, sql

title: Data Scientist Intern
description_raw:
About the Team

The GoTo KYC Data Science Team develops critical ML models and components that enhance the security and reliability of GoTo’s payment systems. Our team members come from diverse backgrounds, bringing expertise in mathematics, statistics, machine learning, and deep learning to solve complex business challenges in GoPay.

We are passionate about both data science techniques and business impact, fostering a culture of continuous learning and collaboration through internal forums, discussions, and knowledge-sharing sessions. If you’re excited about working at the intersection of AI and financial technology, we’d love to have you on board! 🚀

About GoTo Group

GoTo is the largest digital ecosystem in Indonesia. GoTo's mission is to 'empower progress' by offering technology infrastructure and solutions that help everyone to access and thrive in the digital economy.

The GoTo ecosystem provides a wide range of services, including mobility, delivery, payments, financial services, and technology solutions for merchants. The ecosystem also provides e-commerce services through Tokopedia and banking services through its partnership with Bank Jago.

About Gojek 

Gojek is Southeast Asia’s leading on-demand platform and pioneer of the multi-service ecosystem with over 2.5 million driver partners across the regions offering a wide range of services such as transportation, food delivery, logistics and more. With its mission to create impact at scale, Gojek is committed to resolving consumer problems and raising standards of living by connecting consumers to the best providers of goods and services in the market.

About GoTo Financial

GoTo Financial accelerates financial inclusion through its leading financial services and merchants solutions. Its consumer services include GoPay and GoPayLater and serve businesses of all sizes through Midtrans, Moka, GoBiz Plus, GoBiz, and Selly. With its trusted and inclusive ecosystem of products, GoTo Financial is open to new growth opportunities and aims to empower everyone to Make It Happen, Make It Together, Make It Last.

GoTo and its business units, including Gojek and GoToFinancial ("GoTo") only post job opportunities on our official channels on our respective company websites and on LinkedIn. GoTo is not liable for any job postings or job offers that did not originate from us. description_raw:
We are looking for a motivated Fresh Graduate to join our Huawei Network Project team as a Junior Data Analyst. You will learn to collect, clean, and analyze network performance data from Huawei devices (routers, switches, OLTs). Under the guidance of senior engineers, you will help transform raw telco data into simple dashboards and reports. This is an excellent opportunity to start your career in Telecommunication Data Analytics.

Assist in extracting data from Huawei Network Management Systems (iMaster NCE, U2000) and converting it into Excel/CSV format.

Clean and validate network inventory data (e.g., site names, device serial numbers, port capacity).

Create daily and weekly performance reports using Microsoft Excel (Pivot Tables, Charts, Conditional Formatting).

Help build simple dashboards using Power BI or Tableau to visualize network KPIs (uptime, alarm frequency, bandwidth usage).

Support senior analysts in identifying basic patterns or anomalies in historical network logs.

Document data processing steps and maintain a shared database (Google Sheets / SQL).

title: Data Scientist - Risk Platform
description_raw:
Job Description


We’re looking for fresh graduates with experience in manipulating datasets and building statistical models for credit risk by leveraging machine learning techniques. You will partner with business, product, and engineering team to explore, determine, analyze, propose, and solve some of the most challenging business problems in lending and reduce risk. You will perform deep-dive exploration and analysis to find improvements in our existing framework. You will be submerged in a fast-paced environment working tightly in a strong team of data scientists and experience firsthand our robust data infrastructure.

Responsibilities

Perform features selection, parameter binning, and optimize custom predictive machine learning models for credit risk scoring
Query, process, cleanse, and verify the integrity of data used for analysis
Analyze key metrics to determine risk and explore areas for improvements
Create reports and dashboards to monitor model impact and performance
Help build the variety of data ingredients needed to do modelling effectively
Maintain the credit risk model platform which is utilized by the team
Provide advice and guidance on potential efficiency gains and new state-of-the-art credit risk modelling methodologies

Qualifications


Bachelor degree in an analytical or quantitative discipline (e.g. math, statistics, engineering, computer science), however other disciplines will be considered
Experienced in using statistical computer languages such as R, Python SAS, SQL, or advanced MS Excel skills is a plus.
Have good communication skills and able to work together in a team
Excellent problem-solving skills and have the drive to learn and master new technologies and techniques
Willingness to learn new skills independently and have a strong sense of project ownership
Not afraid to get your hands dirty to explore data and build statistical models

title: UI/UX Designer Intern
description_raw:
Deskripsi pekerjaan UI/UX Designer Intern PT. Cipta Visi Cakrawala

About Us

We are an early-stage startup building a secure "Rekber" (escrow) platform specifically tailored for the Indonesian market. Our mission is to eliminate digital transaction fraud and build absolute trust between online buyers and sellers. We are looking for an ambitious UI/UX Design Intern to help us translate complex financial logic into a seamless, user-friendly experience.

The Role

As a UI/UX Design Intern, you will get hands-on experience building a digital product from the ground up. You won't just be doing busywork; you will help design the core interfaces of our MVP. You will work directly with the technical founder to understand how design decisions fit into real-world backend capabilities and payment integrations.

Key Responsibilities

Design Escrow Workflows: Assist in creating intuitive user flows for core features like user registration, creating transactions, and releasing payments.
Prototyping & Wireframing: Develop low-fidelity wireframes and high-fidelity interactive prototypes using Figma.
Iterative Design: Refine interfaces based on feedback to ensure the platform visually communicates security and trust to Indonesian users.
Developer Collaboration: Learn how to prepare design specifications and handoffs for the engineering side.
Design System Assistance: Help organize and maintain a clean component library for the application.

Requirements

Background: Currently enrolled in or recently graduated with a degree in UI/UX Design, Information Systems, Computer Science, Graphic Design, or a related field.
Portfolio: A foundational portfolio showcasing UI/UX concepts, university assignments, or personal projects.
Tools: Proficiency in Figma.
Problem Solving: A strong desire to learn how to simplify complex processes (like digital payments) for everyday users.
Communication: Fluent in Indonesian with the ability to clearly explain your design ideas and ask questions when stuck.

What We Offer

Direct Mentorship: Learn how real-world software is built by working one-on-one with an experienced software engineer.
Real Portfolio Impact: Help design an MVP that will actually be built and launched, providing a massive boost to your professional portfolio.
Flexible Work: A remote-first environment that can easily accommodate your university class schedule or thesis work.
Compensation: Monthly stipend provided and/or Academic credit support.
skills: figma, rust, security

title: (INTERN) Junior QA Engineer
description_raw:
Deskripsi pekerjaan (INTERN) Junior QA Engineer PT Kreasi Bali Sasmita

🚀 WE ARE HIRING – INTERNSHIP (UNPAID)

Junior QA Engineer (Quality Assurance)

📍 Penempatan: Remote (Work From Anywhere)

---

🏢 Tentang Kami

PT. Kreasi Bali Sasmita (KBS) adalah perusahaan teknologi digital yang berperan sebagai penyedia solusi sistem manajemen sekolah berbasis digital melalui aplikasi KBS SMS.

KBS SMS merupakan platform terintegrasi yang mendukung pengelolaan data akademik, operasional, hingga keuangan sekolah dalam satu sistem terpusat, guna meningkatkan efisiensi, transparansi, dan kualitas layanan pendidikan.

Seiring dengan transformasi pendidikan digital, kualitas sistem menjadi sangat krusial—tidak hanya berjalan, tetapi harus stabil, minim error, dan siap digunakan dalam kondisi real.

KBS mengembangkan ekosistem teknologi pendidikan berbasis data serta memastikan kualitas sistem melalui proses testing yang terstruktur.

---

🧪 Posisi

Junior QA Engineer (Intern)

---

🎯 Tujuan Program Internship

Memberikan pengalaman nyata kepada peserta dalam:

Testing aplikasi dan website (real product)

Memastikan kualitas sistem sebelum digunakan user

Exposure langsung ke software testing & quality assurance process

---

🛠️ Tugas & Tanggung Jawab

A. Testing & Quality Assurance (Primary)

Melakukan testing fitur aplikasi dan website

Memastikan sistem berjalan sesuai requirement

Mengidentifikasi bug, error, dan issue dalam sistem

Melakukan regression testing setelah perbaikan

---

B. Test Case & Documentation

Membantu menyusun test case sederhana

Mendokumentasikan hasil testing secara sistematis

Menulis bug report yang jelas dan mudah dipahami developer

---

C. Bug Tracking & Reporting

Melaporkan bug ke tim developer

Mengklasifikasikan issue berdasarkan severity

Memastikan issue ditindaklanjuti dan terverifikasi

---

D. User Simulation Testing

Mensimulasikan penggunaan aplikasi dari berbagai jenis user (end-user perspective)

Menguji alur sistem (user flow) secara end-to-end

Mengidentifikasi potensi bug, usability issue, dan logical flow issue

Memastikan setiap fitur berjalan sesuai dengan skenario penggunaan nyata

Memberikan feedback terkait pengalaman pengguna (UX behavior)

---

E. Collaboration (Developer & Product Team)

Berkolaborasi dengan:

Tim Developer

Tim Product

Tim UI/UX

Memberikan feedback terkait usability & system behavior

Mengikuti arahan mentor dalam setiap task

---

🧠 Kualifikasi

Wajib

Mahasiswa aktif / fresh graduate:

Teknik Informatika / Sistem Informasi / Ilmu Komputer / sejenis

Memahami dasar:

Software testing / QA (basic)

Alur aplikasi (web/mobile)

Teliti dan detail-oriented (WAJIB)

Memiliki laptop pribadi

Bersedia mengikuti program internship tanpa gaji (unpaid)

Bersedia bekerja secara remote

---

Nilai Tambah

Pernah melakukan testing aplikasi / project

Memahami:

Bug reporting

Test case

SDLC (Software Development Life Cycle)

Familiar dengan tools:

Google Sheet / Notion / Jira (optional)

Tertarik pada:

Software Quality

Testing automation (future)

Produk digital & EdTech

---

👤 Karakter yang Kami Cari

Teliti dan detail-oriented

Kritis dan observatif

Problem solver

Sabar dan tidak terburu-buru

Memiliki rasa ingin tahu tinggi

Mampu bekerja dalam tim

---

🌱 Benefit & Career Path

💡 Pengalaman real testing aplikasi (bukan dummy project)

🧪 Exposure ke proses QA dalam produk digital

🚀 Pengalaman memahami alur sistem end-to-end

title: IT Intern (for Batam placement)
description_raw:
Deskripsi pekerjaan IT Intern (for Batam placement) Glints Taploker

At Glints, we are building the #1 tech-enabled recruitment and career discovery platform in Southeast Asia that helps people and organizations realize their human potential.


We're looking for an IT Intern to join our IT team in Batam to support the day-to-day technology operations that keep our teams productive and secure across the region.

What You'll Be Doing

- Provide first-line IT support to employees: troubleshooting hardware, software, and connectivity issues

- Manage employee onboarding and offboarding from the IT side: device setup, account provisioning, access management

- Maintain and track IT asset inventory (laptops, monitors, peripherals) across offices

- Operate and monitor existing automation workflows for common IT requests

- Document IT processes and build runbooks to strengthen the team's knowledge base

- Support vendor coordination for device procurement, repairs, and logistics


Why You Should Join Us

- Learn by doing: You'll be hands-on from day one, working across real IT operations, not fetching coffee

- Regional exposure: opportunity to work with the IT regional team across South East Asia & client-facing experience with global clients

- Growth path: This internship is designed to grow into a full-time role for the right person. We invest in people who invest in themselves

- Mentorship: Work directly with experienced IT professionals who will teach you the craft

- Impact: Your work directly affects every employee's productivity, when IT works well, everyone works well


Who We Are Looking For

- Fresh graduate or final-year student in IT, Computer Science, Information Systems, or related field

- Genuine curiosity about technology: you tinker, you Google, you figure things out

- Strong sense of responsibility - you don't drop the ball

- Good communication skills - you can explain technical things to non-technical people

- Willingness to learn fast and push yourself beyond your comfort zone

- Any exposure to scripting, automation, or IT tools is a plus - but attitude matters more than experience

- Willing to work from the Batam office (Working From Office, Monday–Friday), relocation may be supported



Let’s Realize Human Potential.

At Glints, we are building the #1 tech-enabled recruitment and career discovery platform in Southeast Asia that helps people and organizations realize their human potential.

We have impacted many lives but there’s still plenty to be done. If you’re ready to grow and make an impact, you’ve come to the right place.

What is Glints?

Glints is the leading talent ecosystem in Southeast Asia, with an enduring purpose of contributing to a world where people and organizations can realize their human potential.

Today, Glints is the most well-funded and well-capitalized startup in the talent recruitment space in Southeast Asia, with over US$80M in total investments raised till date.

Our tech-enabled approach to recruitment and career discovery connects more than 3 million candidates to their next dream opportunities. We have also supported more than 50,000 companies in finding top talent and doubling recruitment efficiency.

Our agility and firm hold on our core purpose and values have allowed us to remain resilient and thrive through tumultuous times.

In 2020, we were recognized by LinkedIn as one of the Top 10 Startups in Singapore. In 2022, we were featured in the top 20 of Nikkei-FT-Statista High-Growth Companies Asia-Pacific 2021 list. Moreover, we were also featured in the top 10 fastest-growing companies in Singapore by The Straits Times.

Who We Are

At Glints, personal and professional growth are just as important as business growth. That's why we created the Glints Culture Code: #RIIBCOH. It defines our values, is what guides our decisions and actions, and is what makes us special.

#RIIBCOH:

1. Relentlessly Resourceful: Whatever it takes, just make it happen (ethically)

2. Integrity: Have courage, be guided by the truth, don’t be afraid

3. Impact: Missionaries, not mercenaries

4. Beginners’ Mindset: Stay humble, don’t be attached to ego

5. Customer Obsessed: Customers First

6. Ownership: Care intensely about the mission and take responsibility

7. High Standards: Dream big and deliver epic outcomes fast

Where we work

Since Glints was officially launched in Singapore in 2015, we've rapidly grown our footprint across Greater Southeast Asia to operate in Indonesia, Singapore, Vietnam, Taiwan, Malaysia and Philippines.

Learn more about Glints and our culture at bit.ly/glintsculture.

title: Manager Consultant (Cybersecurity)
description_raw:
Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Information Systems, Computer Science, or a related field.

7+ years of experience in cybersecurity, IT risk, or consulting, with at least 2 years of experience leading teams or projects.

Hands-on experience in at least two of the following areas: cybersecurity maturity assessment/roadmap development, risk management, pentest oversight, or security governance.




Responsibilities:

Lead and manage multiple cybersecurity projects in parallel (scope, timeline, budget, and quality).

Develop project plans, including risk/assumption/issue/dependency tracking, and ensure deliverables meet the required standards.

Manage penetration testing projects (web, mobile, API, and infrastructure), including methodology selection, scoping, and team coordination.

Support the preparation of proposals, effort estimation, and the development of SOW/SoW (Scope of Work).

General Qualification:

Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Information Systems, Computer Science, or a related field.

7+ years of experience in cybersecurity, IT risk, or consulting, with at least 2 years of experience leading teams or projects.

Hands-on experience in at least two areas: cybersecurity maturity/roadmap development, risk management, pentest oversight, or security governance.

Required Skills:

Project management (planning, tracking, QA, and stakeholder reporting).

Strong communication skills (able to translate technical issues into business impact).

Workshop facilitation, interviewing, documentation, and professional report writing.

Leadership and coaching (mentoring junior consultants, reviewing deliverables, and knowledge sharing).

Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC).

Basic understanding of network, system, cloud architecture, IAM, and logging/monitoring.

Knowledge of application security concepts: OWASP Top 10, API security, SDLC/SSDLC, and threat modeling (a plus).

Ability to assess pentest results and validate findings (severity, exploitability, and impact).

Certifications:

ISO/IEC 27001 Lead Auditor

CEH/CPENT/CHFI

Security+ (a plus for general baseline knowledge)

title: AI Engineer Specialist
description_raw:
Job Requirements

Bachelor’s degree (S1), preferably in IT, Information Systems, or Digital Business.

2–4 years of experience in technology or operations-related roles.

Proficient in using generative AI platforms such as Claude (for complex text/data processing), Gemini, ChatGPT, or Midjourney.

Hands-on experience with automation tools such as Zapier, Make.com, or Microsoft Power Automate to streamline manual processes.

Ability to explain complex technologies in simple, easy-to-understand terms for non-technical stakeholders.

Strong analytical skills to evaluate AI performance vs. human work (cost-benefit analysis).

Proven portfolio or real examples of AI-based workflows/projects that have been developed.




Job Description

Analyze existing manual processes and identify opportunities to improve productivity through AI and automation across departments.

Define and monitor KPIs to measure productivity improvements driven by AI implementation in each team.

Evaluate and compare the cost-effectiveness of AI solutions versus human resources, ensuring optimal resource allocation.

Implement AI-driven workflows to reduce dependency on manual work and minimize the need for additional manpower.

Identify repetitive and low-value tasks, and transform them into scalable automated processes.

Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate AI tools into daily operations seamlessly.

Continuously optimize AI implementations to enhance efficiency, accuracy, and turnaround time.

Ensure that AI adoption contributes to overall company growth without increasing operational costs disproportionately.
